summary.zh: 发现本机 Unreal Editor、选择实例，并查看当前独占连接。
summary.en: Discover local Unreal Editors, select one, and inspect the active exclusive session.

tools.name: list_umg_mcp_servers
tools.zh: 列出发现目录中仍然存活的 UE 编辑器实例及动态端口。
tools.en: Lists live UE editor instances and their dynamically assigned ports.

tools.name: connect_umg_mcp
tools.zh: 连接指定 host/port；可同时绑定目标资产并申请 exclusive 会话。
tools.en: Connects to a host/port, optionally binding a target asset and an exclusive session.

tools.name: get_umg_mcp_connection
tools.zh: 返回当前端点、client id、session id 与服务器连接状态。
tools.en: Returns the active endpoint, client id, session id, and server-side connection state.

summary.zh: 先确定能创建什么，再把后续操作限定到明确的 UMG、Blueprint 或控件。
summary.en: Learn what can be created, then scope every later operation to an explicit UMG, Blueprint, or widget.

tools.name: get_widget_schema
tools.zh: 读取某一 Widget 类型支持的属性与结构 Schema。
tools.en: Reads the supported property and structure schema for a widget type.

tools.name: get_creatable_widget_types
tools.zh: 列出当前版本可以创建的 Widget 类型。
tools.en: Lists widget types that can be created by the current build.

tools.name: get_target_umg_asset
tools.zh: 读取当前 UMG 目标资产及相关元数据。
tools.en: Reads the active UMG target asset and related metadata.

tools.name: get_target_blueprint_asset
tools.zh: 读取 BlueCode 当前使用的 Widget 或普通 Blueprint 目标。
tools.en: Reads the Widget or general Blueprint currently targeted by BlueCode.

tools.name: get_target_widget
tools.zh: 读取当前 UMG 资产内聚焦的具体控件。
tools.en: Reads the focused widget inside the active UMG asset.

tools.name: get_last_edited_umg_asset
tools.zh: 返回最近一次编辑的 UMG 资产。
tools.en: Returns the most recently edited UMG asset.

tools.name: get_recently_edited_umg_assets
tools.zh: 按数量上限返回近期编辑过的 UMG 资产。
tools.en: Returns recently edited UMG assets up to a requested limit.

tools.name: set_target_umg_asset
tools.zh: 设置后续 Widget、动画和保存操作使用的 UMG 资产。
tools.en: Sets the UMG asset used by later widget, animation, and save operations.

tools.name: set_target_widget
tools.zh: 把读取或写入范围缩小到指定控件或容器。
tools.en: Narrows later reads and writes to a specific widget or container.

tools.name: set_target_blueprint_asset
tools.zh: 把已有 Widget、Actor、Object 等 Blueprint 设为 BlueCode 目标。
tools.en: Targets an existing Widget, Actor, Object, or other Blueprint for BlueCode.

summary.zh: 读取真实 Widget Tree、指定属性、几何布局与重叠情况。
summary.en: Read the real widget tree, selected properties, geometry, and overlap state.

tools.name: get_widget_tree
tools.zh: 从聚焦控件开始读取紧凑 Widget Tree；未聚焦时从根节点开始。
tools.en: Reads a compact widget tree from the focused widget, or from the root when none is focused.

tools.name: query_widget_properties
tools.zh: 只查询指定控件的一组属性，避免把整个资产塞进上下文。
tools.en: Queries only selected properties on one widget to keep context compact.

tools.name: get_layout_data
tools.zh: 读取控件的边界框与布局数据，用于位置和尺寸验证。
tools.en: Reads bounding boxes and layout data for position and size verification.

tools.name: check_widget_overlap
tools.zh: 诊断控件之间的几何重叠。
tools.en: Diagnoses geometric overlap between widgets.

summary.zh: 以增量、可审查的方式创建控件、改属性、调整树结构并保存。
summary.en: Create widgets, change properties, adjust hierarchy, and save through reviewable incremental operations.

tools.name: create_widget
tools.zh: 在指定父控件下创建一个新 Widget，并给出稳定名称。
tools.en: Creates a named widget under an explicit parent.

tools.name: set_widget_properties
tools.zh: 并集覆盖所提供的属性；未提及属性保持不变。
tools.en: Union-updates only the supplied properties and preserves omitted properties.

tools.name: delete_widget
tools.zh: 显式删除控件；必须传入 confirm_delete=true。
tools.en: Explicitly deletes a widget and requires confirm_delete=true.

tools.name: reorder_widget_tree
tools.zh: 用局部树调整同父级顺序；不创建、不删除未提及 sibling。
tools.en: Reorders siblings from a partial tree without creating or deleting omitted siblings.

tools.name: reparent_widget
tools.zh: 兼容型结构操作：用新容器就地包裹或替换目标控件。
tools.en: Compatibility structural operation that wraps or replaces a widget in place.

tools.name: save_asset
tools.zh: 保存当前目标资产。
tools.en: Saves the current target asset.

title.zh: 资产转换、内容浏览与关卡工具
title.en: Asset transforms, content browsing & level tools

summary.zh: 让 UMG 可导出、回写，并提供必要的项目资产和关卡操作。
summary.en: Round-trip UMG data and perform the project asset and level operations needed around it.

tools.name: export_umg_to_json
tools.zh: 把指定 UMG 反编译为结构化 JSON，便于审查和版本化。
tools.en: Decompiles a UMG asset to structured JSON for review and versioning.

tools.name: apply_layout
tools.zh: 首选的结构化布局写入入口，相对当前目标容器应用布局。
tools.en: Preferred structured layout writer, applied relative to the active target container.

tools.name: apply_json_to_umg
tools.zh: 兼容型批量 JSON 回写；新流程优先使用 apply_layout。
tools.en: Compatibility bulk JSON apply; new workflows should prefer apply_layout.

tools.name: apply_html_to_umg
tools.zh: 兼容型 HTML 到 UMG 转换；新流程优先使用 apply_layout。
tools.en: Compatibility HTML-to-UMG conversion; new workflows should prefer apply_layout.

tools.name: refresh_asset_registry
tools.zh: 强制刷新资产注册表，使新资产立即可见。
tools.en: Refreshes the Asset Registry so newly created assets become visible.

tools.name: get_actors_in_level
tools.zh: 列出当前关卡中的 Actor。
tools.en: Lists actors in the current level.

tools.name: spawn_actor
tools.zh: 在关卡中生成指定类型的 Actor。
tools.en: Spawns an actor of a requested type in the level.

tools.name: list_assets
tools.zh: 按内容路径浏览项目资产。
tools.en: Browses project assets by content path.

summary.zh: BlueCode 是推荐的语义层；节点级命令保留为兼容执行原语。
summary.en: BlueCode is the recommended semantic layer; node-level commands remain compatibility primitives.

tools.name: compile_blueprint
tools.zh: 编译并保存指定 Blueprint。
tools.en: Compiles and saves a Blueprint.

tools.name: bluecode_set_function
tools.zh: 设置当前函数、图表或 Widget.Event 编辑范围。
tools.en: Selects the active function, graph, or Widget.Event for editing.

tools.name: bluecode_read_function
tools.zh: 以 semantic、roundtrip 或 debug 细节层级读取当前图表。
tools.en: Reads the active graph at semantic, roundtrip, or debug detail levels.

tools.name: bluecode_read_variables
tools.zh: 读取 Blueprint 成员变量的紧凑语义表示。
tools.en: Reads Blueprint member variables as compact semantic data.

tools.name: bluecode_read_events
tools.zh: 读取可绑定事件候选与当前已绑定事件。
tools.en: Reads bindable event candidates and currently bound events.

tools.name: bluecode_apply
tools.zh: 以 union 语义规划或原子应用 BlueCode；支持 dry-run、revision 冲突检查、source map 与失败回滚。
tools.en: Plans or atomically union-applies BlueCode with dry-run, revision checks, source maps, and rollback.

tools.name: bluecode_apply_variables
tools.zh: 仅新增或匹配成员变量，不删除未提及变量。
tools.en: Union-adds or matches member variables without deleting omitted variables.

tools.name: bluecode_connect
tools.zh: 为复杂节点显式新增 Pin 连接；不会替换既有连接。
tools.en: Explicitly adds pin connections for complex nodes without replacing existing links.

tools.name: bluecode_delete
tools.zh: 删除节点、变量或连接；要求 confirm_delete=true 且拒绝歧义目标。
tools.en: Deletes nodes, variables, or links with confirm_delete=true and ambiguity checks.

tools.name: bluecode_compile
tools.zh: 编译并保存当前 BlueCode 目标，返回简洁诊断。
tools.en: Compiles and saves the active BlueCode target with concise diagnostics.

tools.name: bluecode_search_nodes
tools.zh: 搜索当前图表上下文有效的节点，并返回稳定 action handle。
tools.en: Searches context-valid nodes and returns stable action handles.

tools.name: add_step
tools.zh: 兼容原语：在程序光标后添加可执行节点。
tools.en: Compatibility primitive that adds an executable node after the program cursor.

tools.name: prepare_value
tools.zh: 兼容原语：创建 Getter、Literal 等纯数据节点。
tools.en: Compatibility primitive that creates data nodes such as getters or literals.

tools.name: connect_data_to_pin
tools.zh: 兼容原语：把数据节点连接到目标 Pin。
tools.en: Compatibility primitive that connects a data node to a target pin.

tools.name: get_function_nodes
tools.zh: 列出当前函数图表中的全部节点。
tools.en: Lists all nodes in the active function graph.

tools.name: add_variable
tools.zh: 兼容原语：添加成员变量。
tools.en: Compatibility primitive that adds a member variable.

tools.name: delete_variable
tools.zh: 兼容原语：删除成员变量。
tools.en: Compatibility primitive that deletes a member variable.

tools.name: get_variables
tools.zh: 列出 Blueprint 成员变量。
tools.en: Lists Blueprint member variables.

tools.name: delete_node
tools.zh: 兼容原语：按节点 ID 删除节点。
tools.en: Compatibility primitive that deletes a node by id.

tools.name: set_edit_function
tools.zh: 兼容原语：设置节点级命令使用的函数或图表。
tools.en: Compatibility primitive that sets the graph used by node-level commands.

tools.name: set_cursor_node
tools.zh: 兼容原语：显式设置节点级程序光标。
tools.en: Compatibility primitive that explicitly sets the node-level program cursor.

tools.name: search_function_library
tools.zh: 搜索可调用的 Blueprint 函数库。
tools.en: Searches callable Blueprint functions.

summary.zh: 按动画、控件或时间片读取和写入轨道、属性与关键帧。
summary.en: Read and write tracks, properties, and keys by animation, widget, or time slice.

tools.name: set_animation_scope
tools.zh: 设置当前动画范围。
tools.en: Sets the active animation scope.

tools.name: set_widget_scope
tools.zh: 设置动画操作使用的控件范围。
tools.en: Sets the widget scope used by animation operations.

tools.name: get_all_animations
tools.zh: 列出当前 UMG 资产中的所有动画。
tools.en: Lists all animations in the active UMG asset.

tools.name: get_animation_keyframes
tools.zh: 兼容读取：返回指定动画的关键帧。
tools.en: Compatibility read that returns keyframes for an animation.

tools.name: get_animated_widgets
tools.zh: 列出某动画影响到的控件。
tools.en: Lists widgets affected by an animation.

tools.name: get_animation_full_data
tools.zh: 兼容读取：返回完整动画数据。
tools.en: Compatibility read that returns full animation data.

tools.name: get_widget_animation_data
tools.zh: 兼容读取：返回一个控件在指定动画中的数据。
tools.en: Compatibility read for one widget inside an animation.

tools.name: animation_widget_properties
tools.zh: 按控件视角读取动画属性时间线。
tools.en: Reads animated property timelines from the widget perspective.

tools.name: animation_time_properties
tools.zh: 读取指定时间点的属性值。
tools.en: Reads property values at requested times.

tools.name: animation_overview
tools.zh: 汇总动画轨道与关键帧，适合作为首个读取命令。
tools.en: Summarizes tracks and keys and is the preferred first animation read.

tools.name: create_animation
tools.zh: 在当前 UMG 资产中创建动画。
tools.en: Creates an animation in the active UMG asset.

tools.name: delete_animation
tools.zh: 删除动画；要求 confirm_delete=true。
tools.en: Deletes an animation and requires confirm_delete=true.

tools.name: set_property_keys
tools.zh: 兼容写入：设置一个属性轨道的关键帧。
tools.en: Compatibility writer for keys on one property track.

tools.name: remove_property_track
tools.zh: 删除属性轨道；要求显式确认。
tools.en: Removes a property track with explicit confirmation.

tools.name: remove_keys
tools.zh: 按时间删除指定属性的关键帧；要求显式确认。
tools.en: Removes keys at requested times with explicit confirmation.

tools.name: animation_append_widget_tracks
tools.zh: 首选写入：从控件视角追加或覆盖提供的属性关键帧。
tools.en: Preferred writer that appends or overwrites supplied keys from the widget perspective.

tools.name: animation_append_time_slice
tools.zh: 首选写入：在一个时间点为多个控件追加属性切片。
tools.en: Preferred writer that appends a multi-widget property slice at one time.

tools.name: animation_delete_widget_keys
tools.zh: 按动画、控件、属性和时间显式删除关键帧。
tools.en: Explicitly deletes keys by animation, widget, property, and time.

summary.zh: 既支持材质节点图编辑，也提供更紧凑的 HLSL 参数/输出工作流。
summary.en: Edit full material graphs or use the more compact HLSL parameter/output workflow.

tools.name: material_set_target
tools.zh: 设置材质目标；可在不存在时创建。
tools.en: Sets the material target and can create it when missing.

tools.name: material_modify_type
tools.zh: 修改 Domain、Blend Mode、Shading Model 与 Two Sided 等类型设置。
tools.en: Changes domain, blend mode, shading model, two-sided state, and related material type settings.

tools.name: material_define_variable
tools.zh: 定义 Scalar、Vector 或 Texture 外部参数。
tools.en: Defines external Scalar, Vector, or Texture parameters.

tools.name: material_add_node
tools.zh: 从节点库放置节点并分配唯一 handle。
tools.en: Places a node from the library and assigns a unique handle.

tools.name: material_delete
tools.zh: 按唯一 handle 删除材质节点。
tools.en: Deletes a material node by its unique handle.

tools.name: material_connect_nodes
tools.zh: 使用自然连接规则连接两个节点。
tools.en: Connects two nodes using natural connection rules.

tools.name: material_connect_pins
tools.zh: 在复杂拓扑中显式连接源 Pin 与目标 Pin。
tools.en: Explicitly connects source and target pins for complex topologies.

tools.name: material_set_hlsl_node_io
tools.zh: 向 Custom 节点注入 HLSL 并同步输入 Pin。
tools.en: Injects HLSL into a Custom node and synchronizes input pins.

tools.name: material_set_node_properties
tools.zh: 设置普通材质节点的内部属性。
tools.en: Sets internal properties on regular material nodes.

tools.name: material_get_pins
tools.zh: 读取指定节点或 Master 输出可用的 Pin。
tools.en: Reads available pins for a node or the Master output.

tools.name: material_get_graph
tools.zh: 读取完整材质图拓扑。
tools.en: Reads the complete material graph topology.

tools.name: hlsl_set_target
tools.zh: 设置 HLSL 材质目标；支持创建、覆盖确认与材质类型参数。
tools.en: Sets an HLSL material target with create, overwrite confirmation, and material type options.

tools.name: hlsl_get
tools.zh: 读取当前 HLSL、参数定义与输出。
tools.en: Reads the active HLSL code, parameters, and outputs.

tools.name: hlsl_set
tools.zh: 并集更新 HLSL、参数和输出；不会删除未提及项。
tools.en: Union-updates HLSL, parameters, and outputs without deleting omitted items.

tools.name: hlsl_delete_parameter
tools.zh: 兼容删除：显式删除命名参数并要求确认。
tools.en: Compatibility deletion for named parameters with explicit confirmation.

tools.name: hlsl_delete
tools.zh: 首选删除：按名称删除参数或输出，歧义时可指定 kind。
tools.en: Preferred deletion for parameters or outputs, with an optional kind for ambiguous names.

tools.name: hlsl_delete_output
tools.zh: 兼容删除：显式删除命名输出并要求确认。
tools.en: Compatibility deletion for named outputs with explicit confirmation.

tools.name: hlsl_compile
tools.zh: 编译并保存当前 HLSL 材质，返回简洁诊断。
tools.en: Compiles and saves the active HLSL material with concise diagnostics.
